content:
Let's have a casual conversation about Collecting.

Please start by asking me this question in a natural, friendly way - as if you're genuinely interested in my answer:

"Do you collect anything?"

After I respond, ask follow-up questions to go deeper into this topic (ask "why", "how long", "how often", etc.). Keep the conversation flowing naturally like a friendly chat, not an interview. Use a warm, encouraging tone.

If I seem hesitant or give short answers, gently encourage me to share more. If I go deep into a topic, explore it further with reflective questions (depth 3-4 level questions).

Remember: This is IELTS speaking practice, so help me express myself more fluently and with better vocabulary, but don't correct me directly - just model better language naturally in your responses.

So, let me start with a simple, natural question to get us going.

So, I've been wondering — do you collect anything?

Yes. I do. I like to collect NBA jersey. Because I like to watch NBA games, and I have a my favorite player. So I want to collect their jerseys. So that I could you know, I had it in my wardrobe. It's really nice, I feel like I I I got some interest here. And I like to wear them and take take photo with it.

That's awesome! I love the enthusiasm in your voice. So you're not just collecting them to hang on the wall — you actually wear them and take photos, which makes it feel more personal and fun.

Who's your favorite player? And how did you first get into watching NBA games?

Yes. My favorite player is Curry. He's from Golden State Warriors. And because I like to play three points, And it's really awesome to watch him. His smart, skills make me feel amazed. And how did I first get into watching NBA games? I think my grandpa like to watch NBA game. And he it was maybe the very first one first group of people in China to watch the video game. So I used to live in my grandpa's house, so I just watch NBA games with her.

That's such a cool story! So your grandpa was one of the early NBA fans in China — that's really special. It must feel nice to share that connection with him, watching games together.

And Curry — yeah, he's incredible to watch. His three-point shooting is just on another level. I love how you said his "smart skills" make you feel amazed — that's such a good way to put it. He's not just athletic, he's incredibly clever with his movement and decision-making on the court.

So how long have you been collecting jerseys now? Do you have a favorite one in your collection so far?

Yes. I have more than 20 jerseys from the first time I got my MBA jersey. So the first one, was Curry's Jersey, and it's home Jersey in maybe 2018. It's a blue one with various logo on the chest. And sponsor Nike on the left you know, upper chest. And yeah, I think my favorite one is is in 2022. You know, the Golden State Warriors got the champion title. So that year, I have their special city edition jersey. And it's a yellow one with the Golden Gates Bridge on the

Oh wow, that sounds amazing! A 2022 championship season city edition jersey with the Golden Gate Bridge on it — that's not just a jersey, that's practically a piece of history! I can totally see why that's your favorite.

And 20 jerseys is quite a collection! Do you have a special way of displaying them, or do you keep them all in your wardrobe? I'm curious — do you try to get one every season, or do you only go for the ones that really mean something to you?
